---
title: "The natESM Journey for Improving Software Quality in Earth System Modelling"
#subtitle: "What is already there and where to go"
author: <br>Wilton Jaciel Loch 
institute: German Climate Computing Center (DKRZ)
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    theme: night
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: slow
    background-transition: fade
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    logo: images/natesm_small.png
    fontsize: 34pt
    css: styles.css
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "images/default_background.jpg"
---

## The state of affairs {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

::: {.r-stack}
![](images/atlas.png){.fragment fig-align="center" width=40%}

::: {.fragment .absolute top=170 width=250 left=38%}
Earth System Modelling
:::

::: {.fragment .absolute top=560 width=250 left=42%}
HPC Scientific Software
:::

:::

## Like Atlas, HPC software is not feeling well {background-image="images/sad_statue.jpg" background-position="0% 50%" background-size="120%"}

. . .

<br>
No trained software engineers

. . .

<br>
Organic development

. . .


<br>
Software seen only as a tool

. . .

<br>
Understaffed institutions


## Poor software quality is a huge waste of resources {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

. . .

<br>
Software quality costed the US economy **U$ 2.41 Trillions** in 2022^1^

::: {.r-stack}

![](images/cpsq_breakdown_1.svg){.fragment}

![](images/cpsq_breakdown_2.svg){.fragment}

![](images/cpsq_breakdown_3.svg){.fragment}

:::

## {background-image="images/iceberg.jpeg" background-position="0% 20%" background-size="120%"}

## Visible costs {background-image="images/iceberg.jpeg" background-position="35% 0%" background-size="230%"}

. . .

<br>
Wrong and failed experiments

. . .

<br>
User support

## Hidden costs {background-image="images/iceberg.jpeg" background-position="25% 100%" background-size="180%"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column}

::: {.fragment}
<br>
Fixing bugs
:::

::: {.fragment}
<br>
Complex code
:::

::: {.fragment}
<br>
Technical debt
:::

::: {.fragment}
<br>
Longer onboarding
:::

:::

::: {.column}
::: {.fragment}
<br>
Excessive systems costs
:::

::: {.fragment}
<br>
Lost research opportunities
:::

:::

:::

## natESM comes to help {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

. . .

<br>
Improving **technical infrastructure to serve Science**

. . .

<br>
6 months projects (sprints)

. . .

<br>
Well-defined **goals and timeline**

## natESM has improved many models {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

![](images/model_logos/icon.png){.fragment .absolute top=270}

![](images/model_logos/messy.png){.fragment .absolute left="250" top=220}

![](images/model_logos/fesom.png){.fragment .absolute width="30%" left=450 top=270}

![](images/model_logos/wam.png){.fragment .absolute width="15%" left=900 top=220}

![](images/model_logos/esmvaltool.png){.fragment .absolute top="470" width="40%"}

![](images/model_logos/palm.png){.fragment .absolute  top="420" left=550}

![](images/model_logos/pism.png){.fragment .absolute width="20%" top="470" left=800}

::: {.fragment .absolute top="660"}
And more... 
:::

::: {.notes}
Get the exact number of models and more examples to talk about
:::

## What was done {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

<br>
<br>

::: {.r-stack}

![](images/natesm_work_breakdown_1.svg){.fragment}

![](images/natesm_work_breakdown_2.svg){.fragment}

![](images/natesm_work_breakdown_3.svg){.fragment}

:::

::: {.notes}
Think of a better title
Correct the plot
:::

## The case of CLEO {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}


::: {.columns .absolute top=200}

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](images/parallelization.png){width="40%"}
<br>
Parallelization <br>with MPI
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](images/hand-shake.png){width="40%"}
<br>
Coupling <br>with ICON
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
![](images/tests.png){width="40%"}
<br>
Versionining
<br>
Releases
<br>
Git workflows
<br>
CI/CD
:::

:::

## You can only improve what you can measure {background-image="images/default_background.jpg"}

. . .

<br>
A simple framework to list software quality deficiencies

. . .

<br>
Evaluation produces a **score** for the model

. . .

<br>
List of actionable items that can be worked on during a sprint

## Some of the criteria {background-image="images/sad_statue.jpg" background-position="top left"}

. . .

<br>
Tests

. . .

<br>
CI

. . .

<br>
Poorly named variables

. . .

<br>
Unreachable code

. . .

<br>
No comments

## Conclusion {background-image="images/sad_statue.jpg" background-position="top left"}

. . .

<br>
Poor software quality has large hidden costs 

. . .

<br>
natESM has improved many models with its sprints

. . .

<br>
We are introducing a software quality evaluation framework to assess and further improve models
